# Batch 16 RemoteDesk Manifest: Advanced Automation, AI-Powered Insights, and Ecosystem Scaling

This manifest details all files generated or modified as part of Batch 16 for the RemoteDesk project. This batch focuses on enhancing the platform with advanced automation, AI-driven insights, and capabilities for ecosystem scaling.

## Generated Files

- `remotedesk/packages/shared/ai-diagnostics/anomaly-detection-dtos.ts`
